name: Ease of Use
description: How intuitive and user-friendly the interface is for new and experienced users

name: User Engagement Features
description: Interactive capabilities such as chat, reactions, live comments, and community tools that enhance viewer participation

name: Ease of Use
description: The ease with which users can start and manage a live stream, including setup time, user interface, and cross-platform compatibility.

name: Security and Encryption
description: The strength and implementation of encryption protocols used during file transmission and storage, including end-to-end encryption, password protection, and data privacy safeguards.

name: Active User Base
description: The number of active users and viewers on the platform, indicating its popularity and reach.

name: App Performance and Stability
description: The app's performance in terms of speed, reliability, and minimal crashes or bugs during use.

name: Cross-Platform Compatibility
description: The ability of the app to function seamlessly across different operating systems and device types

name: Update Frequency and Innovation
description: The frequency and impact of updates, including new features, bug fixes, and performance improvements, to ensure the app remains current and reliable.

name: Monetization Fairness
description: The balance between free-to-play accessibility and in-app purchases, ensuring the app does not create pay-to-win dynamics or overly aggressive monetization.

name: User Base & Popularity
description: The total number of active users and downloads the app has accumulated, reflecting its widespread adoption and market presence.

name: Content Catalog Depth
description: The total volume and diversity of titles available for consumption within the platform's library.

name: Community and Social Features
description: The presence and quality of community features such as reviews, ratings, comments, or social sharing to foster engagement.

name: User Interface and Experience
description: The intuitiveness, design quality, and ease of navigation within the app, including content discovery, search functionality, and personalized recommendations.

name: Global Availability
description: Extent to which the app is accessible and functional across different countries and regions

name: Content Variety
description: Breadth and diversity of available live or on-demand streaming content across categories and genres

name: Reliability
description: Consistency of successful transfers without crashes, interruptions, or data corruption

name: Offline Functionality
description: Ability to create, edit, and access content without an internet connection

name: Cross-Platform Availability
description: Availability and consistency across different operating systems and devices

name: Cross-Platform Availability
description: The availability of the app across multiple platforms (e.g., iOS, Android, web) and devices.

name: Discoverability
description: The ease of discovering new streams and content through recommendations, search, and trending sections.

name: Ease of Use
description: Simplicity and intuitiveness of initiating and managing broadcast messages

name: Customization Options
description: The level of customization available to users, including themes, note templates, folder organization, and personalization of the user interface.

name: Feature Depth
description: Breadth and sophistication of tools and effects available to users

name: Monthly Active Users (MAU)
description: The number of active monthly users, indicating the app's popularity and reach for streaming content.

name: Cross-Platform Availability & Sync
description: The app's availability across multiple devices and operating systems, and its ability to seamlessly synchronize user progress, subscriptions, and preferences across them.

name: Performance and Efficiency
description: The app's performance in terms of stability, battery efficiency, and resource usage while shuffling playlists, especially for large libraries or offline playback.

name: Free vs. Premium Value Proposition
description: The balance between features available for free and those locked behind a paywall, and the overall value provided at each pricing tier.

name: Integration Ecosystem
description: Ability to connect with third-party apps and services to extend collaborative workflows

name: User Experience and Accessibility
description: The overall user experience, including ease of use, customization options, and accessibility across devices and platforms.

name: Output Quality and Export Options
description: The resolution and fidelity of the final processed image, along with the flexibility of export formats, sharing options, and resolution settings.

name: Security and Privacy
description: Measures in place to protect user data, including encryption and privacy controls

name: Personalization Features
description: The availability of personalized recommendations based on user ratings, watch history, or preferences.

name: Streaming Quality
description: Maximum and average video resolution, bitrate stability, and playback reliability

name: Monetization Opportunities
description: The availability of monetization options for streamers, such as ads, subscriptions, virtual gifts, donations, and sponsorships.

name: Scalability
description: The ability of the software to handle an increasing number of recipients or data volume without performance degradation.

name: Customer Support
description: The quality and frequency of customer support, including responsiveness to user issues, community engagement, and availability of help resources.

name: Ease of Use
description: How intuitive and streamlined the process is from initiating to completing a file transfer, including minimal setup steps and clear user interface design

name: Integration with Other Platforms
description: The app's integration with other platforms or services, such as social media sharing, cross-platform streaming, or third-party tools.

name: Cross-Platform Accessibility
description: Availability and consistency of the app across different devices and operating systems.

name: Advanced Editing Tools
description: The availability of advanced editing tools alongside effects, such as layering, masking, and manual adjustments.

name: User Experience (UX)
description: The overall user experience, including app design, navigation, and intuitiveness of the interface.

name: User Ratings and Reviews
description: The overall user ratings and reviews on app stores, reflecting user satisfaction and app performance.

name: Library Size
description: The number of movies available on the platform, including exclusives and licensed content.

name: Pricing and Value for Money
description: The cost of using the app, including free tiers, subscription models, or one-time purchases, and the value provided.

name: Additional Features
description: The presence of additional features such as file previews, collaboration tools, or integration with other apps/services.

name: User Experience
description: Ease of navigation, clarity of information, and overall usability of the interface

name: Cross-Platform Synchronization
description: The ability to maintain listening progress, subscriptions, and settings across multiple devices and operating systems.

name: Privacy Controls
description: Level of encryption and user control over who receives or can view broadcasted messages

name: Innovation and Unique Features
description: The availability of unique or standout features that differentiate the app from competitors, such as AI-powered layouts or animation tools.

name: Update Frequency
description: How often product listings, prices, and offers are refreshed
